title: Council (disambiguation)
content:
A '''council''' is a group of people, staffed by councilors and usually those possessing some form of governing power.

==Canon==
*'''[[Advisory council]]'''— a council that operated on the [[planet]] [[Troithe]] alongside remnants of the [[Galactic Empire]]'s forces.
*'''[[Andelm IV council]]'''— a council that controlled the [[Law enforcement agency|law enforcement]] on the planet [[Andelm IV]].
*'''[[Archaeological Research Council]]'''— a committee of [[archaeologist]]s on [[Kallidah]].
*'''[[Bahk-tov Council]]'''— also known as the '''Bardotta Council''', was the ruling body of [[Bardotta]] and comprised of members from the [[Dagoyan Order]].
*'''[[Black Sun ruling council]]'''— a group of [[Falleen]] [[noble]]s that controlled the [[Black Sun]] until its massacre by [[Lord]] [[Maul]] and the [[Shadow Collective]].
*'''[[Bromlarch Council]]'''— the planetary government council of [[Bromlarch]].
*'''[[Calamari Council]]'''— also known as the '''Mon Calamari government council''', was a representative legislative body of [[Mon Cala]].
*'''[[Council (Remainders)]]''', the governing body of the [[Remainders]] of [[Moonbender Colony]]
*'''[[Council of Elders]]'''— a [[Religion|religious]] body within the [[Elders of the Path]], privy to sacred knowledge.
*'''[[Council of Elders (Ewok)]]'''— the ruling body of an [[Ewok]] tribe on the [[Endor|Forest Moon of Endor]].
*'''[[Council of Elders (Path of the Open Hand)]]'''— the governing body that oversaw the [[Path of the Open Hand]].
*'''[[Council of First Knowledge]]'''— one of four [[Jedi Council]]s within the [[Jedi Order]], and was responsible for procuring advise and ancient wisdom.
*'''[[Council of Labor Abuses]]'''— a body within the [[Imperial Senate]].
*'''[[Council of Moffs]]'''— a collective body within the Galactic Empire that was composed of [[moff]]s and created following the betrayal of [[Vice Admiral]] [[Dodd Rancit]].
*'''[[Council of Mothers]]'''— the ruling body on the planet [[Gatalenta]].
*'''[[Council of Neutral Systems]]'''— a [[Politics|political faction]] within the [[Galactic Senate]] that was led by [[Mandalorian]] [[Duchess]] [[Satine Kryze]], and made up of 1,500 neutral [[star system]]s.
*'''[[Council of Reassignment]]'''— one of four Jedi Councils within the Jedi Order, it managed the [[Jedi Service Corps]] as well as [[Jedi Initiate]]s who were chosen to not become [[Padawan]]s.
*'''[[Council of Reconciliation]]'''— one of four Jedi Councils within the Jedi Order, it was charged with settling interplanetary disputes, and worked with the [[Republic Diplomatic Corps]] and the Galactic Senate.
*'''[[Defense Hierarchy Council]]'''— also known as the '''Hierarchy Defense Council''', a military council of the [[Chiss Ascendancy]] which included high-ranking individuals, including [[Supreme Admiral]] [[Ja'fosk]] and [[Supreme General]] [[Ba'kif]].
*'''[[Dug Council]]'''— also known as the '''Malastarian council''', a government body that represented the [[Dug]] [[species]] on [[Malastare]].
*'''[[Entropian Hive Trading Council]]'''— a group that controlled the [[Entropian Hive]] [[asteroid]] trading post.
*'''[[Executive Separatist Council]]'''— the executive government body of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]], helmed by [[Head of State]] [[Count]] [[Dooku]] and comprised of the leaders of major corporations.
*'''[[First Order Supreme Council]]'''— alternatively known as the '''First Order High Council''', a high-ranking military council of [[First Order High Command]] that was created and chaired by [[Supreme Leader]] of the [[First Order]] [[Ben Solo|Kylo Ren]].
*'''[[Grand Hutt Council]]'''— a ruling group of each [[Hutt]] crime family that led the [[Hutt Clan]]. Its leader was [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].
*'''[[Gungan High Council]]'''— also identified as the '''Gungan Rep Council''', was the governing body of [[Gungan]] society on the planet [[Naboo]].
*'''[[Iego council]]'''— a guild of residents and officials on [[Iego]].
*'''[[Imperial Future Council]]'''— a short-lived group of high ranking Imperial officials, including [[Grand Moff]] [[Valco Pandion]], [[Admiral]] [[Rae Sloane]], [[General]] [[Jylia Shale]], [[Arsin Crassus]], and [[Yupe Tashu]] that attempted to take control of the splintering Empire during the [[Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[Imperial Ruling Council]]'''— also known as the '''Imperial Advisory Council''', a collective ruling body of bureaucrats that was made up of the closest [[advisor]]s of [[Galactic Emperor]] [[Darth Sidious|Sheev Palpatine]]. The Imperial Rulign Council ran the affairs of the Empire.
*'''[[High Council (Talz)|High Council]]'''— the governing group of [[Talz]] on [[Orto Plutonia]] that was led by [[Chief]]tain [[Thi-Sen]].
*'''[[Imperial Penal Council]]'''— a judicial organization within the Galactic Empire.
*'''[[Jedi Council]]'''— a governing group within the Jedi Order, including the [[Council of First Knowledge]], the [[Council of Reassignment]], the [[Council of Reconciliation]], and the [[Jedi High Council]].
*'''[[Jedi High Council]]'''— a body of twelve high-ranking [[Jedi]] that led the Jedi Order. It was led by the [[Master of the Order]], and spearheaded the Jedi Order's operations.
*'''[[Li-Toran planetary council]]'''— a ruling council created by the largest [[Melitto hive]] following the [[Unending Conflict]] to prevent further catastrophe.
*'''[[Mandalorian Government Council]]'''— also known as the '''New Mandalorian ministry council''' or simply as the '''Ruling Council''', it was the government body of [[minister]]s charged with maintaining the [[New Mandalorians|New Mandalorian government]].
*'''[[Naboo Royal Advisory Council]]'''— also known as the '''Royal Consultative Council''', it was composed of ministers that served as advisors for the [[Monarch of Naboo]].
*'''[[Oba Diah high council]]'''— an organization within the [[Pyke Syndicate]] on [[Oba Diah]].
*'''[[Republic High Council]]'''— an organization of the [[Galactic Republic]] active during the [[High Republic Era]].
*'''[[Republic Judiciary Council]]'''— a judicial organization that held responsibility over the [[Republic Judiciary Central Detention Center]] and its 3,200-strong [[Coruscant Guard]] force.
*'''[[Republic Security Council]]'''— a Galactic Senate committee that was responsible for protecting the Republic and oversaw the Republic's war effort during the [[Clone Wars]]. It advised the [[Supreme Chancellor]] and possessed the ability to activate any of the [[Executive Order Codes for the Grand Army of the Republic]].
*'''[[Ruling Council (Kamino)]]'''— the governing council that oversaw the [[Kaminoan]] government.
*'''[[Ruling Council (Skako Minor)]]'''— a governing planetary council of [[Skako Minor]], until the massacre of its members by the Empire. It was replaced by the [[Skakoan Council]].
*'''[[Security council]]'''— a [[New Republic]] committee responsible for security and defense.
*'''[[Shadow Council]]'''— a secret council of high-ranking Imperials that was established in the latter stages of the Galactic Civil War and survived [[Standard year|years]] into the [[New Republic Era]]. Originally, it was comprised of [[Counselor to the Empire]] [[Gallius Rax]], [[Grand Admiral]] [[Rae Sloane]], [[Grand Moff]] [[Randd]], [[General]] [[Hodnar Borrum]], [[Commandant]] [[Brendol Hux]], and [[Chief informational officer]] [[Ferric Obdur]]. During the New Republic Era, it was composed of Grand Admiral [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo]], [[Moff]] [[Gideon]], Commandant Hux, [[Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon]], and multiple [[warlord]]s.
*'''[[Special Senator Council on Galactic De-Escalation Strategies]]'''— a [[New Republic Senate]] committee.
*'''[[Skakoan Council]]'''— a ruling regime that governed Skako Minor that was loyal to the Galactic Empire.
*'''[[Togruta security council]]'''— a security and military council within the [[Togruta government]] that was tasked with advising the [[Togruta]] [[monarch]] on such issues.
*'''[[Toydarian Ministry Council]]'''— a ministerial body of [[Togruta]] that also advised the ruling monarch.
*'''[[Umbaran ruling council]]'''— a governing body that ruled the [[Umbaran government|government]] of [[Umbara]].
*'''[[Virujansi council]]'''— the government that oversaw [[Virujansi]] until its replacement by an Imperial [[governor]]ship.
*'''[[War Council Advisory Panel]]'''— a Galactic Republic military body that advised the Supreme Chancellor of matters related to the war effort during the Clone Wars.
*'''[[Wookiee Council]]'''— the government that ruled [[Kashyyyk]] and was a member of the Galactic Republic.
*'''[[Yomo Council]]'''— a faction that splintered from the Galactic Empire during the final stages of the civil war and based on [[Fedovoi End]] until its destruction.
